name: Fail Trap (失败诱导)
logic_steps: Mandatory Execution: The Golden 3 Seconds MUST display a spectacularly stupid choice/operation by the player.
Visuals must showcase a frustrating, dramatic failure (e.g., character dies, massive red 'X', trapped).
Audio and subtitles MUST use 'IQ suppression' messaging (e.g., 'Why is this so hard?').
The frustration should drive high cognitive dissonance leading the viewer to think 'I can do this better'.
